summary: PARTIAL PASS — 9 of 10 hotfix items verified correct, 1 remaining blocking finding in Phase 3D test. FUNCTION INSERTs: All 10 INSERTs across 3 functions (fn_mark_mid_ready 5, fn_record_dispatch_result 3, fn_cadence_check 2) now use correct lcs_errors columns and constraint-compliant values. VERIFIED PASS. CONSTRAINT EXTENSION: chk_lcs_errors_stage extended with 'cadence_check'. VERIFIED PASS. NEON DEPLOYMENTS: 3 functions + 1 constraint reported DEPLOYED. TEST FILES: 4 of 5 test files verified aligned (3A, 3B, 3C, 4A). Phase 3D test_retry_dead_letter_governor.py has UNRESOLVED CHECK constraint violations — column NAMES are fixed but column VALUES violate chk_lcs_errors_stage and chk_lcs_errors_type. Hotfix report claim 'all_tests_aligned: true' is INCORRECT for Phase 3D. PHASE RECLASSIFICATIONS: Phase 3C reclassified from FAIL_EXECUTION back to PASS (blocking finding BF-3C-001 resolved). Phase 3D remains FAIL_EXECUTION with new blocking finding (CHECK constraint violations replace column name mismatch).

blocking_findings.title: Phase 3D test — CHECK constraint violations on lcs_errors INSERT values
blocking_findings.detail: test_shows_dead_items_with_error_context (test_retry_dead_letter_governor.py, line 238-243) inserts a synthetic error row into lcs_errors with constraint-violating VALUES. Column names are now correct (hotfix fixed this), but values are not constraint-compliant. Two violations: (1) error_stage='test_retry' is NOT in chk_lcs_errors_stage — allowed values are: cid_processing, sid_creation, mid_minting, dispatch_finalization, canonical_update, emission_validation, emission_processing, cadence_check. (2) error_type='VALIDATION' is uppercase — chk_lcs_errors_type requires lowercase: validation, state_violation, expired, conflict, external_fail. The INSERT will throw psycopg2.errors.CheckViolation at runtime, preventing test execution. Lines 264-265 assert row[1] == 'test_retry' and row[2] == 'VALIDATION' — these match the wrong values and must also be updated.
blocking_findings.action: Change INSERT values: error_stage from 'test_retry' to a valid stage (e.g., 'emission_processing' — semantically appropriate for retry/dead-letter testing), error_type from 'VALIDATION' to 'validation' (lowercase). Update assertions on lines 264-265 to match the corrected values.

fix_detail.line_238_243_current: INSERT INTO lcs.lcs_errors (error_stage, error_type, error_payload, is_retryable) VALUES ('test_retry', 'VALIDATION', '{"message": "test error for dead letter"}'::jsonb, TRUE)
fix_detail.line_238_243_fixed: INSERT INTO lcs.lcs_errors (error_stage, error_type, error_payload, is_retryable) VALUES ('emission_processing', 'validation', '{"message": "test error for dead letter"}'::jsonb, TRUE)

claim_all_tests_aligned.auditor_verdict: INCORRECT — Phase 3D test has CHECK constraint violations

hotfix_report_accuracy.overall: Hotfix report is accurate for functions, views, and constraint extension. Test alignment claim is incorrect for Phase 3D — column names were fixed but values were not validated against CHECK constraints.

phase_3A.reason: Function INSERTs were already correct before hotfix. Hotfix report states 'inserts_fixed: 5' but Phase 3A fn_mark_mid_ready had correct columns all along. The hotfix may have been applied defensively. No change needed.

phase_3C.reason: BF-3C-001 resolved. All 3 fn_record_dispatch_result INSERTs now use correct columns (error_stage='dispatch_finalization', lowercase error_types, mid/sovereign_id, error_payload as jsonb). MID-not-found uses mid=NULL + attempted_mid pattern. Test file (test_transport_adapter_contract.py) aligned — _count_errors uses error_stage. Phase 3C audit report updated.

phase_3D.reason: Original blocking findings BF-3D-001 and BF-3D-002 (column name mismatch) partially resolved — column names are fixed. NEW blocking finding BF-HOTFIX-001: CHECK constraint violations on VALUES (error_stage='test_retry' not in constraint, error_type='VALIDATION' uppercase). Phase 3D audit report updated with new finding.

phase_4A.note: Phase 4A changeset (CS_20260224_PHASE4A_CADENCE_GOVERNOR) is in changesets/inbox/ awaiting first audit. Function INSERTs and constraint extension verified correct in this hotfix audit.
